next_action: Add skills-first callable command metadata and dispatch support to the tracker adapter.
title: Create callable tracker command suite

final_summary: Added a skills-first callable tracker command suite with list/describe discovery, dashboard export visibility, docs, and regression tests. The suite is internal-only and owned by control-repo-manager so Codex can call tracker capabilities without telling the user to run terminal commands.
next_action: Use the callable command suite from control-repo-manager when Codex needs tracker status, intake, checkpoint, closeout, validation, upload, or dashboard export.
review_state: self-reviewed command metadata, skill ownership, UI export, and no Python regression
